name: project-setup
description: Architectural decision-maker for repos — new and existing. Covers any decision about repo / project structure, frontend or backend architecture, database choices, docker / compose layout, deployment modes, env-config split, secrets, design tokens, modularity, ML cloud orchestration, mobile / desktop targets, mono- vs poly-repo. Not just bootstrap: equally for restructuring an established repo, adding a service, splitting a backend, introducing a second frontend, picking a database, moving from compose-at-root to docker/, etc. One slash command (/ps-setup) with init | audit | suggest modes. Composes with sibling dstack and documentation-guide skills.
